project.title: Education for Every Child
project.shortDescription: Bringing quality education to underserved communities across Afghanistan through teacher
project.fullDDescription: Providing quality education to children in underserved communities across Afghanistan. Our program includes teacher training, curriculum development, and school supply distribution.
